title: Privacy Mirror
subtitle: Local linkage, adversary, coverage, and future-spend privacy evidence for the active book.

question.future: What is unknown or worsens on a future spend

score.local: Computed locally from your book — no chain lookup.

worstKind.common_input: Wallets linked by a shared-input spend

adversaryTier.reviewed_kyc_source_funds_anchor_watcher: An exchange that checked your ID
adversaryTier.known_counterparty_hypothetical: Someone you paid or were paid by

assumption.bitcoin_graph_facts_only: Starts only from public blockchain facts already in your local data.
assumption.reviewed_anchor_starting_knowledge: Starts from the source-of-funds anchors you've reviewed locally.
assumption.counterparty_starting_knowledge: Starts from counterparties you've labelled locally.

heuristics.title: Heuristics checked
heuristics.note: Mirrors the am-i-exposed heuristic set. Kassiber computes the locally-derivable subset — no chain lookup, no entity database, no entropy engine.

finding.empty: No findings in the local model.

reco.sender_common_input: Avoid spending coins from different clusters in one transaction — a shared input links them.
reco.common_input: Avoid spending coins from different clusters in one transaction — a shared input links them.
reco.fee_fingerprint: A distinctive fee rate narrows the wallet set. Match common fee rates where you can.
reco.op_return_output: OP_RETURN data is public and permanent. Avoid attaching identifying metadata.
reco.change_output: Change can reveal wallet structure. Use matching script types and fresh addresses.
reco.unknown_provenance: Review where these coins came from so their provenance is known locally.
reco.source_proximity_coverage_gaps: Some owned coins lack reviewed source-funds proximity. Import or review their history to complete the picture.
reco.coverage_degraded: Analysis is incomplete — sync or import missing transaction detail to strengthen it.
reco.transaction_tell: Review this transaction's inputs and outputs for linkage.
reco.fallback: Review this item for privacy exposure.

section.psbt: Check a spend before you send (PSBT)

flow.title: Transaction flow
flow.subtitle: Local flow graph — advisory only, never leaves this device.

worst.title: Worst privacy risk
worst.empty: The reduced local model did not return a stronger finding.

unknowns.title: Unknowns and degraded states
unknowns.empty: No unknown coverage row was emitted by the reduced local model.

table.empty: No rows in this reduced view.

psbt.title: PSBT and what-if
psbt.intent: Paste a draft (unsigned) transaction to see what it would link — before you broadcast it.
psbt.placeholder: Paste base64 PSBT text for local pre-broadcast analysis

scenario.fresh_receive_output: If you received to a fresh address

detail.source: Same redacted local facts as the Privacy Mirror page.
detail.degraded: No matching redacted Privacy Mirror row is available for this local record.
detail.queryError: Privacy Mirror could not be read: {{message}}
detail.walletMatched: Matched redacted wallet row {{id}}. Advisory-only; it does not select coins or change accounting data.
detail.transactionMatched: Matched redacted transaction row {{id}}. Advisory-only; it does not sign, broadcast, or mutate accounting data.

unavailable.title: Privacy Mirror unavailable
unavailable.body: The local daemon did not return a Privacy Mirror payload.
